mapper.select: SELECT log_id, push_id, action, operator_id, operator_name, remark, created_at FROM operation_log WHERE push_id = #{pushId, typeHandler=com.campus.platform.handler.UUIDJdbcTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT log_id, push_id, action, operator_id, operator_name, remark, created_at FROM operation_log ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log (log_id, push_id, action, operator_id, operator_name, remark, created_at) VALUES ( #{logId, typeHandler=com.campus.platform.handler.UUIDJdbcTypeHandler}, #{pushId, typeHandler=com.campus.platform.handler.UUIDJdbcTypeHandler}, #{action}, #{operatorId, typeHandler=com.campus.platform.handler.UUIDJdbcTypeHandler}, #{operatorName}, #{remark}, #{createdAt} )
